title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking - Don't Allow - Enable now - Ask [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Location permission "Ask Next Time" option during Find My Device onboarding does not show expected Allow Once/Allow while using app/Don't Allow options on Android
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time
Tap 'Don't Allow' when the location permission dialog appears
Log in or continue as a guest
Open the Poly Lens menu by tapping the hamburger icon (☰)
Tap 'Enable now' for Find My Device
Grant location permission by selecting 'Ask Next Time or When I Share' option
expected: Permission dialogs appear at appropriate steps with correct options: Allow Once, Allow while using the app, and Don't Allow on Android.
